channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
### Bug Fix

- **Fixed "Check for Updates" always disabled** — the Sparkle update check button was permanently grayed out in standalone builds. Root cause was a Combine publisher not reliably updating the `@Observable` property. Switched to direct KVO observation which correctly triggers on app launch.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
